text:
In the little town of Willow Creek, the cherry trees bloomed extraordinary springlies. Every autumn, folks would gather to watch the biggest orange blossoms they'd ever seen.

There was Lily. Everyone called her the cherry queen because of her fascination.

One autumn Lily decided she'd like an orange blossom tree. She researched until she knew everything there was to know. Then she picked her spots.

Years passed. The trees flourished. People came from far away.

But a fox? Just one? It thought they were just a flower. Nothing scared the little guy. He chased roundballs instead.

So they grew big.


One big branch broke. The fox lost a wing.

That winter...that spring...

They never spoke.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
